svg.title: IoTsmart XIAO overview
svg.desc: IoTsmart XIAO — carrier for XIAO form-factor SoM modules
svg.text: Carrier for XIAO form-factor SoM modules · plugs directly into IoTextra mezzanine modules
Compatible with Seeed Studio XIAO · Adafruit QT Py · H-HOST or V-HOST connector · Qwiic
Part of the IoTsmart series · compatible with IoTextra mezzanine modules · Make Things Happy!
